name: Bean Dish
recipeIngredient: 1 bag frozen bell pepper strips (or chunkies)
2 cans small red beans (15 oz each)
1/4 teaspoon cayenne (less if you're not into fire...)
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the bag of onion chunkies and add them to a non-stick pot.
Heat until translucent.
2. Add the frozen bell pepper strips and heat until thawed.
3. Drain and rinse all the beans, then add them to the pot.
4. Add about one cup of water to the pot to ensure there are some juices.
5. Heat everything until hot.
6. Once heated through, add the cumin, ground chipotle peppers (optional), and cayenne pepper.
Adjust the seasonings according to your taste preferences.
7. Serve over brown rice.
This dish served three people and provided leftovers for future lunches.
